overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a white coat walking through a space station concourse, transitioning through industrial corridors, and entering a restroom. The environment features metallic surfaces, artificial lighting, and futuristic industrial architecture with various NPCs populating the initial area.

scene_state.functional_zone: space station cargo concourse with industrial equipment

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the busy concourse toward the exit doorway

notable_agents.action: group of NPCs standing and conversing near the wall
NPC in teal jacket and light pants walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large vertical metal pipes running along the left wall of the concourse
stacked wooden crates and cargo boxes along the right side
large circular metal airlock door with yellow safety markings
yellow painted safety lines on the metal floor grating
industrial ceiling lights illuminating the concourse area

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide industrial concourse with metal flooring and yellow safety markings. Large vertical pipes line the left wall while cargo containers stack along the right. Several NPCs populate the area, including a group conversing on the left and an individual in a teal jacket approaching from ahead. The space is well-lit with overhead industrial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional airlock corridor connecting concourse to interior

events.description: character turns right and walks through doorway from open concourse into narrow corridor
doorway frame temporarily fills the view as character passes through the threshold

agents.ego_description: turning right and passing through the doorway into a narrower corridor section

notable_agents.action: NPC in teal jacket passing through the doorway in the opposite direction

entered.detail: metal door frame marking the transition between concourse and corridor
dark metal wall panels lining the narrow corridor
rectangular fluorescent light fixtures on the corridor ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character turns right and passes through a doorway frame into a narrower, more enclosed corridor. The open concourse with its cargo containers falls behind as dark metal bulkhead walls close in on both sides. An NPC in a teal jacket passes by in the opposite direction. The lighting shifts to focused overhead fixtures as the character moves deeper into the interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: space station restroom with metal stalls and industrial fixtures

events.description: character enters restroom area with visible sinks and toilet stalls ahead
character slows and comes to a stop in front of the toilet stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor, entering the restroom, and approaching the toilet stalls

notable_agents.action: NPC in white jacket standing at a wall-mounted terminal or sink

entered.detail: metal sink basin mounted on the left wall of the restroom
enclosed toilet stalls with metal doors and partitions
electronic terminal or interface screen mounted near the sink
metal divider walls separating the toilet stalls

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds through the narrow corridor and enters a restroom area. A metal sink basin and wall terminal appear on the left where an NPC stands. The character continues past the sink toward metal toilet stalls at the back, slowing to a stop in front of the stall doors. The space maintains the industrial aesthetic with metal partitions and overhead ventilation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling industrial concourse into the sterile confinement of a station restroom. It begins in a wide, well-lit area characterized by metal flooring, yellow safety markings, and stacked cargo containers where several NPCs congregate. As the character turns right, the open space gives way to a narrower, enclosed corridor with dark metal bulkhead walls and focused overhead lighting. The scene then shifts as the character exits the corridor and enters a restroom area, passing a metal sink basin and a wall terminal. Finally, the camera moves past an NPC toward metal toilet stalls at the back, coming to a stop against the industrial partitions.
